purpose: Fail-closed certification matrix for adapter surfaces whose support, reference coverage, and proof commands must not drift into unsupported pass claims.

status_catalog.meaning: The adapter has live native implementation coverage and may report pass only through listed rch proof commands.
The adapter is feature-gated or opt-in; pass is valid only with listed feature flags and proof commands.
The adapter has implemented local surfaces, but live reference or deployment coverage is partial; dashboards must render xfail or blocked until proof is wired.
The adapter declaration exists, but required implementation or reference proof is unavailable; pass is forbidden.

required_for_non_pass_status: proof_commands are present and start with rch exec --

implemented_features: HTTP/1.1 server connection lifecycle and keep-alive policy
HTTP/2 frame codec, settings exchange, stream state, and GOAWAY/RST handling
unsupported_or_out_of_scope: HTTP/3 and QPACK support are certified separately by artifacts/http3_qpack_support_matrix_v1.json
reference_coverage: RFC-derived HTTP/1 and HTTP/2 vector suites
proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_adapter_matrix_h1 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test conformance_h1_expect --features test-internals -- --nocapture

rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_adapter_matrix_h2 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test conformance_h2_goaway_graceful_shutdown --features test-internals -- --nocapture

unsupported_or_out_of_scope: Real server parity depends on external service availability and feature flags
Reference comparisons must not be rendered as pass without the listed rch lanes
proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_adapter_matrix_pg CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test postgres_query_execution_golden --features test-internals,postgres -- --nocapture

rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_adapter_matrix_mysql CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test mysql_binary_protocol_sqlx_conformance --features test-internals,mysql -- --nocapture

rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_adapter_matrix_sqlite CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test sqlite_wal_conformance --features test-internals,sqlite -- --nocapture

implemented_features: JetStream context and stream/consumer metadata surface
Redis command, RESP3, cluster, and pub/sub surfaces
unsupported_or_out_of_scope: External broker parity requires live broker fixtures or explicitly recorded blockers
Partial local protocol checks must render xfail or blocked when live broker proof is missing
proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_adapter_matrix_nats CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test messaging_nats_handshake --features test-internals -- --nocapture

rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_adapter_matrix_jetstream CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test jetstream_conformance --features test-internals -- --nocapture

rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_adapter_matrix_kafka CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test kafka_record_batch_v2_integration --features test-internals,kafka -- --nocapture

implemented_features: ALPN, SNI, certificate roots, pinning, and handshake timeout configuration
unsupported_or_out_of_scope: TLS pass claims require the tls feature and listed proof lanes
proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_adapter_matrix_tls CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test tls_conformance --features test-internals,tls -- --nocapture

rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_adapter_matrix_grpc_tls CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test grpc_tls_h2_preface_conformance --features test-internals,tls -- --nocapture

unsupported_or_out_of_scope: Full transport deployment parity across QUIC and WebSocket requires feature and environment-specific proof
Mixed transport dashboards must render xfail or blocked when a required lane is missing
proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_adapter_matrix_transport CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test conformance_transport_router --features test-internals -- --nocapture

rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_adapter_matrix_quic CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test conformance_quic_stream_rfc9000 --features test-internals,quic -- --nocapture

rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_adapter_matrix_websocket CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test conformance_websocket --features test-internals -- --nocapture

markdown_golden: | adapter | category | status | fail closed | proof count |
validation_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_adapter_certification_declarations_lib CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --lib adapter_certifications_have_stable_ids_and_statuses -- --nocapture

rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_adapter_certification_matrix CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test adapter_certification_matrix_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture
